title: Pact's End
description:
Can only be played if you have 3 or more cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Deal 17 damage to ALL enemies.
upgraded_description:
Can only be played if you have 3 or more cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Deal 23 damage to ALL enemies.
notes: This card can only be played when your exhaust pile contains at least 3 cards.
